prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约258名、327名、396名、569名、745名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约487名，年均后移约122名；2025年基准位次约745名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年8人、2022年11人、2023年14人、2024年19人、2025年22人；2026年计划增至24人，较2025年扩招2人（+9.1%），扩招趋势延续，竞争压力有所缓解，位次有后移动力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属于上海交通大学（985、211、双一流），软科主榜排名第4（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次；医学院临床医学、口腔医学均为A+学科，整体实力稳居全国医学院第一梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录。声誉偏负面可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、基础医学A-、生物学A+、药学A+，医学学科实力极强；招生专业均紧密围绕上述优势学科，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续高热，医学类专业整体报考热度不减；辽宁省物理类考生数2021年10.3万→2025年14.3万，2026年总考生20万（估算物理类约14–15万），考生规模与2025年基本持平，竞争环境稳定；省控线（本科批）近年稳定在360–368分，无明显波动；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，对辽宁考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在辽宁招生占比相对较小（2026年24人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划继续扩招（+9.1%）、考生规模基本持平、声誉偏负面轻微抑制竞争、医学专业热度持续高热等因素，在2025年基准745名基础上预计位次继续后移。预测2026年物理类最低位次约800名，区间710–890名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，法语班）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，口腔方向）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学（五年制）（卓越医学创新人才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分专业，该校在辽宁招生专业均为临床/口腔类高热度专业，最低位次专业为五年制临床医学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在辽宁仅招物理类考生，招生专业均为临床医学和口腔医学的高端培养项目。位次在预测区间710–890名内，建议以二档五年制临床医学和口腔医学（5+3一体化）为主攻方向，一档八年制本博连读各方向作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间上限（<710名）可重点冲刺八年制本博连读项目。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 258, 327, 396, 569, and 745 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 487 positions over the past 4 years, averaging about 122 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 745; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Liaoning Province has been continuously expanding: 8 students in 2021, 11 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 22 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 24 students, an expansion of 2 students (+9.1%) compared to 2025, continuing the expansion trend, easing competitive pressure, and providing momentum for the ranking to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985, 211, Double First-Class), ranked 4th in the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in China; the School of Medicine's Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are both A+ disciplines, with overall strength firmly in the first echelon of national medical schools; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at a medium-to-high level; no obvious record of admission gaps. The negative reputation may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, Basic Medicine A-, Biology A+, Pharmacy A+, indicating extremely strong medical disciplines; all enrollment majors are closely related to the above advantageous disciplines, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly popular in society, with overall enthusiasm for medical majors remaining undiminished; the number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province increased from 103,000 in 2021 to 143,000 in 2025, with total candidates in 2026 estimated at 200,000 (Physics Category approximately 140,000–150,000), roughly the same scale as 2025, maintaining a stable competitive environment; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been stable at 360–368 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, exerting strong regional appeal to Liaoning candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is relatively small (24 students in 2026), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having a neutral to slightly positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+9.1%), the roughly stable candidate scale, the slight suppression of competition due to negative reputation, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that the ranking will continue to move backward based on the 2025 baseline of 745. The predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 800, with a range of 710–890.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuum, French Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuum, Stomatology Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuum).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) (Excellent Medical Innovation Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently; all majors enrolled by this university in Liaoning are high-popularity Clinical/Stomatology programs, with the lowest ranking major being Five-Year Clinical Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only recruits Physics Category candidates in Liaoning, with all enrollment majors being high-end training programs in Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. For rankings within the predicted range of 710–890, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Five-Year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuum programs as a stretch goal; if the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<710), candidates can focus on applying for the Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuum programs.
